capabilities_used.evidence: 多次直接用周期框架解释 BTC：2025-10-24 说 "the selling we had since the summer on btc is due to the whales who still partially believe in the 4year cycle"；2026-04-08 又说 "What happened mid-October 2025?... 3.9 years cycle top."
虽然不总是明说“减半”，但他反复按年度/季度阶段划分 BTC 大周期顶部与熊市路径，例如 2026-03-26 认为会有 6 个月大区间，2026-04-08 继续维持到 early Q4 的区间+shakeout 预期，属于典型周期分段思维。

明显使用 Elliott Wave：2025-06-25 "The move to 98k ... was probably the end of wave 2"；2025-05-28 "all of this is part of the wave 2 consolidation... because of Elliot wave rule of alternation"；2025-09-30 还讨论 "1-2  1-2  1-2" 的超级牛场景。

SFP 是他最常用的具体 trigger 之一：2025-11-21 "Best scenario locally would be a 4hr SFP of today's..."；2025-04-29 "The fact we didn't get a quick Sfp and retrace is probably showing the resilience of $btc"；2025-04-25 "half the exchanges got Sfp'd"。
他频繁先看流动性是否被扫：2025-04-25 "Taking liquidity... Taking those 83k lows"；2025-04-30 "No lows taken? Higher chances this is a bullish chop"；2024-09-30 也说 "If you're lucky and the lows at 62.3k are taken"。
反复给出 61.8 回撤作为关键位：2025-04-25 明确写出 "61.8% fib retracement of this upmove"；2026-02-16 分析白银时说 "61.8/70.5 fibonnacci retracement zone"。
他经常把回踩均线视作趋势延续/反抽阻力：2025-07-25 直接总结强弱资产分别看 4hr200/100/50；2026-02-25 说 "Any rally into 72.3k ... descending 4hr 200 ema+sma is probably a good area to TP the longs and search for some shorts"。

周线/日线关键均线收复或跌破是他的核心确认条件：2026-01-30 "If we close below the 100W ema+sma at 86k..."；2025-11-21 "Weekly close above 100-week ema at 85.4k"；2024-08-31 对 DOGI 说要 "consolidate above 100d sma, while the 21d ema is catching up"。
他对下行 regime 的识别偏明确，并据此给出更低目标：2026-01-30 "Break and close below 84k on the daily... Close below 86k on the weekly would confirm the breakdown... Target is probably low 70s"。
他大量使用箱体/区间思维：2026-04-08 "Main scenario for me is still a $76k - $50k range until early Q4"；2026-03-26 "a 6 months range between 78-80k... and around 48-53k"；2026-02-25 明确提 "72.3k top of the range"。
他会把高波动与周期末端联系起来：2025-10-29 "Increase in volatility is characteristic of the last innings of a cycle"，本质上是把加速与末段衰竭相连。
样本里没有直接高频提 DXY，但其宏观叙事常把 BTC 放进流动性和风险偏好框架中，属于次要辅助，不是主轴。
他经常把 BTC 与 SPX/Nasdaq 对照：2024-01-30 "SP500 fractal"；2026-01-31 预计 "a 10% correction on spx and nasdaq end of q1"；2025-06-26 因结构失效而转 bullish on trad, $nvda, nasdaq。
2025-09-30 直接说 "BTC is Gold's alt imo... once gold find a local top or range, btc plays the catchup game"，说明他把 BTC 与黄金轮动关系当成可操作框架。
他会用资金费做辅助过滤：2024-09-30 回复里就一句 "Funding tho"；虽然没有系统展开，但表明他会用衍生品情绪校验方向。
样本里未见直接用 NVT，但相比之下他更偏 CVDD/MVRV 这种周期估值工具，因此此能力不算主用。
2026-02-23 明确发文："Bitcoin: MVRV Z-Score is close but still has not touched the buy zone where all the previous bear market lows were formed"，说明他把链上周期估值作为熊底确认工具。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Multi-Month Box Range Extremes
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Define a broad multi-week or multi-month box, fade the boundaries, and wait for sweep/failure behavior at the edges before positioning for mean reversion or final breakout.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 先定义一个持续数周到数月的大箱体，重点交易上下沿附近的扫流动性、假突破和均值回归，而不是中间位置追单。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2026-04-08 "Main scenario for me is still a $76k - $50k range until early Q4"；2026-03-26 "6 months range between 78-80k ... and around 48-53k"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Weekly Close Threshold Validation
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Instead of reacting to intraperiod moves, require the daily or weekly close relative to a key moving average or horizontal level to validate breakout/breakdown scenarios.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 不因盘中刺破立刻改变方向，而是要求日线或周线收盘站上/跌破关键均线或水平位后，才确认趋势切换或区间失效。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2026-01-30 "If we close below the 100W ema+sma at 86k..."；同日又说 "Close below 86k on the weekly would confirm the breakdown"；2025-11-21 "Weekly close above 100-week ema..."。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Cross-Exchange SFP Disagreement
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 跨交易所 SFP 分歧校验
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Compare whether swing highs/lows were swept across different exchanges before accepting an SFP as valid; partial sweeps imply unfinished liquidity business.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 比较不同交易所是否都扫掉同一摆动高低点；如果只有部分交易所完成 SFP，说明流动性清扫可能未结束，单一交易所信号不够可靠。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-04-25 "Obviously, half the exchanges got Sfp'd, the other half not yet"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Astro Cycle Overlay
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use non-traditional planetary or calendar cycle overlays as a supplemental timing model for possible tops and bottoms.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把非常规的天体/历法周期当作辅助择时工具，用来给潜在顶部和底部窗口加时间权重。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-05-26 "Mars-Vesta cycles  Oct 6th $btc top is coded by the crypto gods"；2024-10-31 也提到 "3.9 years mars Vesta cycle"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Session-Based Flow Attribution
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Attribute directional pressure to specific market sessions, especially U.S. hours, to infer ETF or institutional flow dominance.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把价格主导权按亚盘、欧盘、美盘拆开，若卖压主要集中在美盘，则推断 ETF 或传统机构资金在主导行情。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-11-21 "SELLING is happening mainly during U.S. Session"，并进一步归因给 ETF massive outflows 的可能性。

personal_quirks.quote: Highest weekly and monthly close ever tonight for $btc  Explain to me the bear case
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 历史级别收盘创新高时，默认拒绝空头叙事，要求空头先给出更强证据。

personal_quirks.quote: The fact we didn't get a quick Sfp and retrace is probably showing the resilience of $btc
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 预期中的流动性假突破如果没有发生，反而是趋势强度信号。

personal_quirks.quote: No lows taken?  Higher chances this is a bullish chop 🍿
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 在整理区里，如果低点还没被扫，倾向把横盘视为偏强整理而非立即转空。

personal_quirks.quote: If we close below the 100W ema+sma at 86k this week, I expect the 200w SMA  at 69k next, and probably fast
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 关键周线均线的收盘失守才算有效破位，随后按更高一级均线做目标投射。

personal_quirks.quote: Obviously, half the exchanges got Sfp'd, the other half not yet  So who the fck knows which exchange we should believe innit
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 单一交易所的摆动失败不够，跨交易所一致性很重要，否则信号可信度下降。

unique_traits: 他不是纯图形派，也不是纯宏观派，而是把 Elliott wave、SFP/流动性、关键均线收盘确认和大周期叙事混在一起用。和一般 CT TA 交易员相比，他对“多月箱体边缘 + 关键周线收盘 + 周期顶部/底部窗口”的组合依赖更强。附图并非 K 线图而是二次元/漫画图片，因此图像层面的框架提炼基本不可用，本画像主要依据推文文本完成。

high_conviction_phrases: Main scenario for me is still
worked until it found a bigger opponent
